# Release Templates

Use these templates for GitHub Releases and milestone submissions.

---

## Template A - Milestone Release

### Title

`vX.Y.Z - Milestone [Name]`

### Summary

Short description of what was completed during this milestone.

### What Is Included

- Main features or sections completed
- Key fixes and corrections
- Documentation updates

### Academic Progress

- Course objective(s) covered
- Deliverables advanced (report, code, slides, references)
- Current maturity level (draft, revised draft, near-final)

### Validation

- Tests or checks performed
- Manual verification notes
- Known limitations

### Artifacts

- Report draft: [path or link]
- Slides: [path or link]
- Data/resources: [path or link]

### Notes

Any information required by the instructor or team.

---

## Template B - Final Submission Release

### Title

`v1.0.0 - Final Submission`

### Final Scope

This release represents the final project submission.

### Completed Deliverables

- Final report
- Final implementation/codebase
- Final presentation material
- Final references and attributions

### Major Contributions

- Core technical contributions
- Methodological contributions
- Documentation quality improvements

### Quality and Compliance

- Changelog updated
- Attributions completed
- Security policy present
- Versioning guidelines followed

### Submission Artifacts

- Final report (PDF): [path or link]
- Final slides (PDF/PPT): [path or link]
- Supporting files: [path or link]

### Acknowledgments

Credits to team members, supervisor, and external resources.

---

## Template C - Patch/Fix Release

### Title

`vX.Y.Z - Patch`

### Summary

Short description of what was corrected.

### Fixes

- Bug fix 1
- Bug fix 2

### Impact

- What changed for users/reviewers
- Any backward compatibility note

### Verification

- How fixes were tested

---

## Release Checklist

- Tag follows semantic format (`vMAJOR.MINOR.PATCH`)
- `CHANGE-LOG.md` updated
- `README.md` latest changes synced
- `ATTRIBUTIONS.md` reviewed
- Deliverable artifacts attached or linked
- Release notes use one of the templates above
